attributes.action: Uprate Plan 2 repayment threshold and cap student loan interest.
attributes.additional_details:
Freezing the Plan 2 repayment threshold at £29,385 from April 2027 for three years increases repayments through fiscal drag, especially for low and middle earners.
​
Plan 2 interest can be RPI plus up to 3%, so balances may grow despite repayments.
​
Student loans are presented as a contract; retrospective-style worsening of terms may be legal but feels unfair and undermines trust.
attributes.background: Change Plan 2 student loan rules so the repayment threshold rises each year with average earnings, and cap Plan 2 interest at inflation (RPI) for existing and future borrowers. Reverse the 2027–2030 threshold freeze.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for the same action:

Restore Plan 2 student loan repayment threshold increases from April 2026 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759293
